why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet table assigns minecraft:change_difficulty to packet id 0x0a, and the official ClientboundChangeDifficultyPacket(Difficulty, boolean) fixture encodes a context-free body as difficulty via Difficulty.STREAM_CODEC followed by locked via ByteBufCodecs.BOOL. Stevenarella must dispatch and fully consume that official frame body for packet-support evidence.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panicked in stevenarella/protocol/src/protocol/versions/v26_1_2.rs with bad packet id 0xa in Clientbound Play, so Stevenarella did not dispatch the official Play clientbound change_difficulty packet id.
